news.title: Goldman Sachs upgrades India's growth outlook after US-Iran peace deal
news.description: Goldman Sachs has raised India's 2026 real GDP growth forecast to 6.8% from 6.5%, citing lower oil prices, easing supply disruptions and resilient domestic demand following the US-Iran peace deal. news.title: Gold Steadies Near $4,000 as Traders Weigh Interest-Rate Outlook
news.description: Gold traded in a narrow range, a day after a resurgent US dollar and the prospect of higher interest rates pushed the metal below $4,000 an ounce for the first time since November.

news.title: Xiaomi Robot Vacuum 6 Max goes global: New vacuum with mop roller and AI detection
news.description: Xiaomi is preparing a global launch of its new Robot Vacuum 6 Max, a high-end vacuum and mop with strong suction and limited climbing capability. The model also features a triple-camera system designed to enhance obstacle detection.
